# Daggers
# https://revengeofthefallengame.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Daggers&prop=wikitext

The dagger is the main weapon of the rogue, the trickster and the assasin. It is focused on average dps and medium-low range. 
<div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 20px 20px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Speciality</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Primal</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = ClawOfTheBeast.png
| link = Claw of the Beast
| text = Claw of the Beast
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Legendary</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
| {{ImageBlack
| file = DirkOfCronus.png
| link = Dirk of Cronus
| text = Dirk of Cronus
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = SpiritDagger.png
| link = Spirit Dagger
| text = Spirit Dagger
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = ChickenLegOfDoom.png
| link = Chicken Leg of Doom
| text = Chicken Leg of Doom
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = DaggerOfTheEndlessVoid.png
| link = Dagger of the Endless Void
| text = Dagger of the Endless Void
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = PoOoOoOokkErrRr.png
| link = PoOoOoOokkErrRr
| text = PoOoOoOokkErrRr
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = LokisDagger.png
| link = Loki's Dagger
| text = Loki's Dagger
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Heroic</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
| {{ImageBlack
| file = SunshineShiv.png
| link = Sunshine Shiv
| text = Sunshine Shiv
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = ToyKnife.png
| link = Toy Knife
| text = Toy Knife
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = DestructorDagger.png
| link = Destructor Dagger
| text = Destructor Dagger
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge2
| file = DaggerOfGoddessOfGoddesses.png
| link = Dagger of Goddess of Goddesses
| text = Dagger of Goddess of Goddesses
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Artifact</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = CarvedGolemRemains.png
| link = Carved Golem Remains
| text = Carved Golem Remains
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = EtheriteDagger.png
| link = Etherite Dagger
| text = Etherite Dagger
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = SymbioticRipper.png
| link = Symbiotic Ripper
| text = Symbiotic Ripper
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = FirebreathersTail.png
| link = Firebreather's Tail
| text = Firebreather's Tail
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = ShadowscalesHorn.png
| link = Shadowscale's Horn
| text = Shadowscale's Horn
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Unique</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
| {{ImageBlack
| file = BoneDagger.png
| link = Bone Dagger
| text = Bone Dagger
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = AnIcicle.png
| link = An Icicle
| text = An Icicle
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = HeartfindDagger.png
| link = Heartfind Dagger
| text = Heartfind Dagger
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = DaggerOfTheHastefulRabbit.png
| link = Dagger of the Hasteful Rabbit
| text = Dagger of the Hasteful Rabbit
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = DaggerOfTheTerribleTalon.png
| link = Dagger of the Terrible Talon
| text = Dagger of the Terrible Talon
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = DaggerOfTheAmethystPrism.png
| link = Dagger of the Amethyst Prism
| text = Dagger of the Amethyst Prism
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Galactic</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = CometstrikeDirk.png
| link = Cometstrike Dirk
| text = Cometstrike Dirk
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Uncommon</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = AgateclawDagger.png
| link = Agateclaw Dagger
| text = Agateclaw Dagger
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = DaggerOfFoulMalevolence.png
| link = Dagger of Foul Malevolence
| text = Dagger of Foul Malevolence
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = DaggerOfSinisterDeeds.png
| link = Dagger of Sinister Deeds
| text = Dagger of Sinister Deeds
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Normal</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
| {{ImageBlack
| file = SteelDagger.png
| link = Steel Dagger
| text = Steel Dagger
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = Dirk.png
| link = Dirk
| text = Dirk
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = BlueSteelDagger.png
| link = Blue Steel Dagger
| text = Blue Steel Dagger
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = DuskyRoseDagger.png
| link = Dusky Rose Dagger
| text = Dusky Rose Dagger
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = SilverDagger.png
| link = Silver Dagger
| text = Silver Dagger
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = GoldenDagger.png
| link = Golden Dagger
| text = Golden Dagger
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = ObsidianDagger.png
| link = Obsidian Dagger
| text = Obsidian Dagger
}}
|-
| {{ImageBlack
| file = MithrilDagger.png
| link = Mithril Dagger
| text = Mithril Dagger
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = FireDagger.png
| link = Fire Dagger
| text = Fire Dagger
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = RagetalonDagger.png
| link = Ragetalon Dagger
| text = Ragetalon Dagger
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = EmeraldshardDagger.png
| link = Emeraldshard Dagger
| text = Emeraldshard Dagger
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = DaggerOfDireHatred.png
| link = Dagger of Dire Hatred
| text = Dagger of Dire Hatred
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = PoisonFangDagger.png
| link = Poison Fang Dagger
| text = Poison Fang Dagger
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = QueensStingerDagger.png
| link = Queen’s Stinger Dagger
| text = Queen’s Stinger Dagger
}}
|}
</div>

<div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 20px 20px; padding: 15px;">
